violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment hired a new lead. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM. Application was printed out at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the back storage and dishwashing areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of hotel pans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC relocated to 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
A wall in the dry storage area was observed with a hole. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
